description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build job that runs in the build stage using the image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/cluster-integration/auto-build-image/master:stable and the docker:stable-dind service. Set the variable DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR to an empty string. Limit the job to branches and tags with an only rule. In the script, first execute a Bash conditional that checks if CI_COMMIT_TAG is empty; if so, export CI_APPLICATION_REPOSITORY as ${CI_APPLICATION_REPOSITORY:-$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} and CI_APPLICATION_TAG as ${CI_APPLICATION_TAG:-$CI_COMMIT_SHA}, otherwise export CI_APPLICATION_REPOSITORY as ${CI_APPLICATION_REPOSITORY:-$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE} and CI_APPLICATION_TAG as ${CI_APPLICATION_TAG:-$CI_COMMIT_TAG}. Then run the command /build/build.sh.
